integration_validation_v2.gap: Evaluator metric math (pass-rate, p95) is real, but the core 'run validator first-pass in sandbox' is stubbed: LoopSandbox+ValidatorRunner have no production impl and the sandbox 'run' just returns a fresh UUID; integration test header states 'real adapter lives in cluster B' and injects stubs. No PG/validator execution.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/self_improve/evaluator.rs:58 sandbox.run returns SandboxRunResult{uuid} only; impl LoopSandbox exists only as StubSandbox at evaluator.rs:209; tests/validator_first_pass_evaluator_tests.rs:60-91 CountingSandbox/FailingSandbox + RecordingRunner mocks; no production LoopSandbox impl anywhere in src/.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production PgSelfImproveSandbox impl LoopSandbox (src/atelier/validator_first_pass.rs:393-474 - real per-run workspace dir, candidate materialized to disk, persisted via sqlx, migration 0118, EventLedger mirror) and HbrFirstPassRunner impl ValidatorRunner (:572-673 - executes REAL HandoffGate::evaluate appending canonical HBR_HANDOFF_GATE ledger row, persists every execution linked by sandbox_run_id FK). Proof tests/atelier_validator_first_pass_pg_tests.rs: real ValidatorFirstPassEvaluator through both production impls against managed PG - sandbox run re-read with matching snapshot_sha256, candidate file on disk, 6 first-pass rows with verdicts from the real gate, metrics cross-checked vs PG rows, HbrHandoffGate + VALIDATOR_FIRST_PASS_RECORDED events; fixtureless items rejected without persisting. Old StubSandbox now cfg(test)-gated. V2 gap (fresh-UUID stub sandbox) closed.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Stale comment 'real adapter lives in cluster B' remains at tests/validator_first_pass_evaluator_tests.rs:61 in legacy mock-based unit test - factually wrong now, cleanup-worthy, non-blocking.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

scope.v3_correction: v3 correction: the original scope.summary/acceptance text ("Pose And Workflow Structured State Probes") is mis-labelled; the validated deliverable per integration_validation_v2 and the v3 remediation playbook is the validator-first-pass-in-sandbox path (src/atelier/validator_first_pass.rs, PgSelfImproveSandbox + HbrFirstPassRunner, proven by atelier_validator_first_pass_pg_tests).
